overview.description: AI consulting and custom development studio building chatbots, knowledge bases, automations, and AI avatars for B2B clients
overview.description_long: Grove Tech AI is a Prague-based AI-first team that designs and delivers custom AI solutions including AI chatbots, knowledge bases with RAG, process automations, and AI avatars. They bridge generative AI with business systems (CRM/ERP integrations), offering fixed-price projects and monthly retainers. They also operate a sister platform called 'Oživlý obal' — an interactive QR-code product experience platform for FMCG manufacturers.
overview.tagline: Otvíráme vám svět umělé inteligence (We open the world of artificial intelligence for you)

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 2024 as an AI-first studio to help companies implement AI solutions that deliver measurable results — from rapid prototypes to production deployments.

key_milestones.event: Listed on CNAIP (Czech National AI Platform)
Launched 'Oživlý obal' sister platform for interactive QR-based product experiences

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Grove Tech AI is primarily an AI implementation and consulting shop building on top of OpenAI GPT-4, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, and other commodity AI APIs. Their core value proposition — helping companies integrate AI chatbots, RAG knowledge bases, and automations — is highly replicable as AI tooling becomes more no-code and accessible. No proprietary models or datasets.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI consulting for SMEs is a real and growing market in Central Europe, but it is highly fragmented with many competing boutique studios. The 'Oživlý obal' QR product platform is a differentiated niche, but it is unproven at scale and serves a narrow FMCG vertical.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped micro-startup founded in 2024 with 2 employees and no known external funding. Very early stage with limited runway signals and no disclosed revenue.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very small, early-stage, bootstrapped AI consulting studio with high AGI displacement risk (commodity tooling stack), a competitive and fragmented market, and no known funding or significant customer base. While the team appears technically competent, the company has not yet demonstrated scale or defensibility.

metadata.notes: Very small startup (2 employees) founded in 2024. Primary services: custom AI chatbots, RAG knowledge bases, process automation, AI avatars. Sister product platform 'Oživlý obal' for QR-based interactive product experiences. Pricing: project-based from 80,000 CZK (~3,200 EUR) + monthly retainers from 15,000 CZK/month. LinkedIn shows 534 followers and 2 employees as of March 2026.
